name: Blue Water Acquisition Corp. IV
business: We are a blank check company incorporated on August 1, 2025 as a Cayman Islands exempted company with no material operations of our own and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. We have not selected any business combination target and we have not, nor has anyone on our behalf, initiated any substantive discussions, directly or indirectly, with any business combination target.

exposures.sentence: We intend to seek investments in companies with promising drug pipelines aimed at addressing unmet medical needs.
Our strategy includes supporting the development of advanced devices that enhance patient outcomes and streamline healthcare delivery.
We aim to enhance healthcare accessibility through digital health platforms and remote monitoring solutions.
Our focus encompasses advancements in AI-driven diagnostics, wearable health technologies, and health data analytics.
We intend to invest in AI-driven companies that offer transformative solutions across multiple sectors.
We prioritize investments in companies developing cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions to enhance digital security.
Our focus includes businesses that provide scalable and efficient cloud infrastructure and services.
Our strategy supports software companies that enhance business efficiency, productivity, and decision-making.
